Rules.InvariantScript:
Switch(
    currentRole,
    
    "Volunteer",
        ["Home", "Create Incident"],

    "Patrol Captain",
        ["Home", "Create Incident", "Log Equipment"],

    "Club Admin",
        ["Home", "Log Equipment"],

    ["Home"]
)

Switch(
    DropdownMenu.Selected.Value,

    "Home",
        Blank(),

    "Create Incident",
        Reset(DropdownMenu);
        Navigate(CreateIncident, ScreenTransition.Fade),

    "Log Equipment",
        Reset(DropdownMenu);
        Navigate('Equipment Management', ScreenTransition.Fade)
)

If(
ThisItem.EmergencyLevel.Value = "low",
ColorValue("#2AF46E"),
ThisItem.EmergencyLevel.Value = "medium",
ColorValue("#FFB92C"),
ThisItem.EmergencyLevel.Value = "high",
ColorValue("#FF5555"),
ThisItem.EmergencyLevel.Value = "critical",
ColorValue("#EF1014"),
ColorValue("#E5E7EB")
)
